creator: m230761@ingenieria.ingsala.unal.edu.co
text:
I updated our port to the final release available at W3C.
This time it comes with, and uses, libwww4.0 and has new features.
I also updated the config files to fall in "/usr/local/etc" (they were 
installed in another place where they didn't work.
I changed the maintaner (he never answered) to ports@freebsd.org. You may
want to keep his address

Fix: 

ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/httpd.tgz
